title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Archon is an open-source AI coding harness that builds and ships code through custom agent workflows. Cole Medin demonstrated its use in combining Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 models to optimize reasoning power and token efficiency across different task types.
